data.text/markdown:
Pinkerton 2020 Taxonomic Grouping

Aggregates the SO-CPR abundance table into the 11 ecological groups defined in Pinkerton et al. (2020) (Table 1).
Group Name
1 Oithona similis (+ unidentified Cyclopoida)
2 Copepoda (all other copepods)
3 Amphipoda
4 Chaetognatha
5 Euphausiidae (krill, all life stages)
6 Foraminifera
7 Fritillaria spp.
8 Oikopleura spp.
9 Ostracoda
10 Pteropods
11 Other
1. Load Data
2. Define Pinkerton Groups
3. Build Grouped Abundance Table
